title: Fortnite edition
body:
Experience the thrill of Fortnite in Minecraft with Fortnite Edition!

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Get ready to take your Minecraft experience to the next level with the Fortnite edition mod! This exciting mod brings the best of both worlds together, combining the creativity and exploration of Minecraft with the action-packed gameplay of Fortnite. With new weapons you’ll be able to battle like never before. Download now and join the fun!

 

The mod adds

 

Miniguns, Assult rifles, Pistols, SMGs, Pickaxes, Light AMMO, Medium AMMO, And grenades.

 

 

                                                              

  

 

Tell me about bugs and what I should add in the comments

 

Only on forge
